entries.source: Contract: one sentence reminding me that you will ask one question at a time and I can ask for a hint, rephrase, example, challenge, synthesis, or reveal.
entries.value: Kontrak: een sin wat my daaraan herinner dat jy een vraag op 'n slag sal vra en ek kan vra vir 'n wenk, herformulering, voorbeeld, uitdaging, sintese of onthulling.

entries.source: Contrast the tempting wrong model with the correct one.
entries.value: Kontrasteer die verleidelike verkeerde model met die korrekte een.

entries.source: Copper cash, bolts of cloth, credit relationships
Could not save date of birth
Court culture is near its high point
Court translation and debate were significant
court, assembly, palace, command tent, or administrative center
entries.value: hof, vergadering, paleis, bevelstent, of administratiewe sentrum

entries.source: Court, study, prison cell, battlefield tent...
Create a shared task board, ask for my first contribution, then work beside me with checkpoints.
entries.value: Skep 'n gedeelde taakbord, vra vir my eerste bydrae, en werk dan langs my met kontrolepunte.

entries.source: Debate safeguards, social democracy, and the cost of constitutional compromise.
entries.value: Debat-beskermingsmaatreëls, sosiale demokrasie, en die koste van grondwetlike kompromie.

entries.source: Debrief rule: when the learner asks to end or debrief, summarize discoveries, evidence confidence, remaining uncertainties, and award a passport stamp.
entries.value: Debrief-reël: wanneer die leerder vra om te eindig of te debrief, som ontdekkings, bewysevertroue, oorblywende onsekerhede op, en ken 'n paspoortstempel toe.

entries.source: Debugging is not guessing. You form a hypothesis, inspect the smallest failing path, then change one variable at a time.
entries.value: Ontfouting is nie raai nie. Jy vorm 'n hipotese, inspekteer die kleinste falende pad, en verander dan een veranderlike op 'n slag.

entries.source: Define the concrete finish line and owner.
entries.value: Definieer die konkrete wenstreep en eienaar.

entries.source: Define the thing we are making and the standard it has to meet.
entries.value: Definieer die ding wat ons maak en die standaard waaraan dit moet voldoen.

entries.source: Delete the fetch and hard-code the answer.
entries.value: Vee die fetch uit en kodeer die antwoord hard.

entries.source: Delhi was a central site in the 1857 rebellion
entries.value: Delhi was 'n sentrale terrein in die 1857-rebellie

entries.source: Demand shifts right because coffee is more expensive.
entries.value: Vraag skuif na regs omdat koffie duurder is.

entries.source: Develop the strongest option into something testable.
entries.value: Ontwikkel die sterkste opsie tot iets toetsbaars.

entries.source: Diagnose one industry in 5 sentences: identify two strongest forces, explain why, and judge whether profits look protected.
entries.value: Diagnoseer een bedryf in 5 sinne: identifiseer twee sterkste kragte, verduidelik waarom, en beoordeel of winste beskerm lyk.

entries.source: Difficulty rises or softens based on your response.
entries.value: Moeilikheidsgraad styg of daal op grond van jou reaksie.

entries.source: Do not run this as a generic chatbot or a famous-person costume.
entries.value: Moenie dit as 'n generiese kletsbot of 'n bekende persoon-kostuum laat loop nie.

entries.source: Documented, plausible reconstruction, modern paraphrase, contested, or fictionalized.
entries.value: Gedokumenteerde, aanneemlike rekonstruksie, moderne parafrase, betwis, of gefiksionaliseer.

entries.source: During crisis, exile, trial, or imprisonment
entries.value: Tydens krisis, bannelingskap, verhoor, of gevangenisstraf

entries.source: End every sprint with an artifact or decision.
entries.value: Beëindig elke naelloop met 'n artefak of besluit.

entries.source: End this session with a debrief artifact: what the person argued, what I challenged, strongest insight, weakest claim, historical context learned, open questions, recommended next encounters, and any saved quotes clearly marked as generated paraphrases unless sourced.
entries.value: Beëindig hierdie sessie met 'n debrief-artefak: wat die persoon aangevoer het, wat ek uitgedaag het, sterkste insig, swakste bewering, historiese konteks geleer, oop vrae, aanbevole volgende ontmoetings, en enige gestoorde aanhalings duidelik gemerk as gegenereerde parafrases tensy dit van 'n bron voorsien is.

entries.source: Era, public worldview, voice, and what records can support.
entries.value: Era, openbare wêreldbeskouing, stem, en watter rekords kan ondersteun.

entries.source: Evaluate legacy without flattening context into excuse or condemnation.
entries.value: Evalueer nalatenskap sonder om konteks te verplat na verskoning of veroordeling.

entries.source: Events the person has already lived through.
entries.value: Gebeure wat die persoon reeds beleef het.

entries.source: Exact sequence of a street encounter
Exact timing of every alley evacuation
Exact words spoken by ordinary people
entries.value: Presiese woorde wat deur gewone mense gespreek is

entries.source: Exactly. Easy comparison and switching give customers leverage over platforms.
entries.value: Presies. Maklike vergelyking en oorskakeling gee kliënte hefboomwerking bo platforms.

entries.source: Explain a debugging plan: state the symptom, your first hypothesis, the smallest test, and what each result would mean.
entries.value: Verduidelik 'n ontfoutingsplan: meld die simptoom, jou eerste hipotese, die kleinste toets, en wat elke resultaat sou beteken.

entries.source: Explain a market change by naming the curve that moves, the reason it moves, and what happens to price and quantity.
entries.value: Verduidelik 'n markverandering deur die kurwe wat beweeg, die rede waarom dit beweeg, en wat met prys en hoeveelheid gebeur, te benoem.

entries.source: Explain the idea in your own words, give one example, give one non-example, and apply it to a new case.
entries.value: Verduidelik die idee in jou eie woorde, gee een voorbeeld, gee een nie-voorbeeld, en pas dit toe op 'n nuwe geval.

entries.source: Expose missing input, risk, time pressure, or unclear scope.
entries.value: Stel ontbrekende insette, risiko, tydsdruk of onduidelike omvang bloot.

entries.source: Fatehpur Sikri was an imperial center
Faubourg Saint-Antoine on the eve of the Bastille
entries.value: Faubourg Saint-Antoine op die vooraand van die Bastille

entries.source: Fire spreads with wind and dense buildings
entries.value: Vuur versprei met wind en digte geboue

entries.source: First question: exactly one simple diagnostic question.
entries.value: Eerste vraag: presies een eenvoudige diagnostiese vraag.

entries.source: Fixing the visible error message without tracing the state that produced it.
entries.value: Die regstelling van die sigbare foutboodskap sonder om die toestand wat dit veroorsaak het, na te spoor.

entries.source: Flag important context without crowding every reply.
entries.value: Merk belangrike konteks sonder om elke antwoord te oorlaai.

entries.source: Florence was a republic in this period
entries.value: Florence was in hierdie tydperk 'n republiek

entries.source: Follow a historical question through people, objects, and power.
entries.value: Volg 'n historiese vraag deur mense, voorwerpe en mag.

entries.source: Follow an ordinary or decisive day with setting, pressure, and choices.
entries.value: Volg 'n gewone of beslissende dag met omgewing, druk en keuses.

entries.source: Food delivery can have intense rivalry, powerful customers, and easy switching, which squeezes profit even when demand is high.
entries.value: Kosaflewering kan intense mededinging, magtige kliënte en maklike oorskakeling hê, wat wins verlaag selfs wanneer die vraag hoog is.

entries.source: Food prices, rumors, royal politics, and armed crowds are pushing Paris toward a decisive rupture.
entries.value: Voedselpryse, gerugte, koninklike politiek en gewapende skares dryf Parys na 'n beslissende breuk.

entries.source: Foreign merchants gather in regulated spaces
entries.value: Buitelandse handelaars vergader in gereguleerde ruimtes

entries.source: Foreignness can be useful and watched
entries.value: Buitelandsheid kan nuttig wees en word dopgehou

entries.source: Fractions, supply and demand, Newton's laws...
entries.value: Breuke, vraag en aanbod, Newton se wette...

entries.source: Frequent evidence notes and uncertainty labels.
frontier, trade route, borderland, ship, monastery, or garrison
entries.value: grens, handelsroete, grensgebied, skip, klooster of garnisoen

entries.source: Generated dialogue is simulation, not authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Gegenereerde dialoog is 'n simulasie, nie 'n geoutentiseerde aanhaling nie.

entries.source: Give me a topic or paste notes. I will build 12 focused cards with optional hints, traps, and examples.
entries.value: Gee my 'n onderwerp of plak notas. Ek sal 12 gefokusde kaarte bou met opsionele wenke, strikke en voorbeelde.

entries.source: Give one parallel example that helps me think without solving my target. End with one question.
entries.value: Gee een parallelle voorbeeld wat my help dink sonder om my teiken op te los. Eindig met een vraag.

entries.source: Good base. Review the misses below.
entries.value: Goeie basis. Hersien die mislukkings hieronder.

entries.source: Good. You tested timing before rewriting the data model.
entries.value: Goed. Jy het tydsberekening getoets voordat jy die datamodel herskryf het.

entries.source: Group similar ideas and name the pattern.
entries.value: Groepeer soortgelyke idees en benoem die patroon.

entries.source: Guide translates, but locals notice hesitation.
entries.value: Gids vertaal, maar plaaslike inwoners merk huiwering op.

entries.source: Hand the next move to me. Give me one clear task and wait for my contribution before you revise.
entries.value: Gee die volgende skuif aan my. Gee my een duidelike taak en wag vir my bydrae voordat jy hersien.

entries.source: Harbor warehouses near Rome's grain supply
Harder mode: after you answer, add a counterexample or a boundary where the idea stops working.
entries.value: Moeiliker modus: nadat jy geantwoord het, voeg 'n teenvoorbeeld of 'n grens by waar die idee ophou werk.
Help my om JavaScript-beloftes te ontfout

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
entries.value: Help my om aanbod en vraag te leer

entries.source: Help me understand supply and demand
entries.value: Help my om aanbod en vraag te verstaan

entries.source: Higher price does not mean demand increased. The tax starts on the supply side by changing seller costs.
entries.value: Hoër prys beteken nie dat die vraag toegeneem het nie. Die belasting begin aan die aanbodkant deur verkopers se koste te verander.

entries.source: Historically plausible resident attached to ordinary networks
entries.value: Histories aanneemlike inwoner verbonde aan gewone netwerke

entries.source: Horse sweat, incense, lacquer, copper cash, and languages braided through a regulated market.
entries.value: Perdesweet, wierook, lakwerk, kopermuntstukke en tale verweef deur 'n gereguleerde mark.

entries.source: Hot tar, panicked footsteps, bells, smoke, and the crack of timber in a city built too tightly.
entries.value: Warm teer, paniekerige voetstappe, klokke, rook en die gekraak van hout in 'n stad wat te dig gebou is.

entries.source: How any single bystander felt about Socrates
entries.value: Hoe enige toeskouer oor Sokrates gevoel het

entries.source: How deep should the expedition go?
entries.value: Hoe diep moet die ekspedisie gaan?

entries.source: How do you want to be seen when you arrive?
entries.value: Hoe wil jy gesien word wanneer jy aankom?

entries.source: How strict should the crossing be?
entries.value: Hoe streng moet die oorgang wees?

entries.source: How strong are you right now?
entries.value: Hoe sterk is jy op die oomblik?

entries.source: I am asking for direct explanation. Give a concise explanation, then require me to restate the corrected idea in my own words.
entries.value: Ek vra vir 'n direkte verduideliking. Gee 'n bondige verduideliking, en vereis dan dat ek die gekorrigeerde idee in my eie woorde herformuleer.

entries.source: I can compress the explanation, but I still need one proof of understanding before unlocking the next step.
entries.value: Ek kan die verduideliking saampers, maar ek het steeds een bewys van begrip nodig voordat die volgende stap ontsluit word.

entries.source: I could not answer right now. Please try again.
entries.value: Ek kon nie nou antwoord nie. Probeer asseblief weer.

entries.source: I could not build that deck right now. Try a shorter topic or simpler notes.
entries.value: Ek kon nie daardie dek nou bou nie. Probeer 'n korter onderwerp of eenvoudiger notas.

entries.source: I could not build that quiz right now. Try a simpler topic or try again.
entries.value: Ek kon nie daardie vasvra nou bou nie. Probeer 'n eenvoudiger onderwerp of probeer weer.

entries.source: I could not save that card review. Please try again.
entries.value: Ek kon nie daardie kaartresensie stoor nie. Probeer asseblief weer.

entries.source: I could not score that answer. Please try again.
entries.value: Ek kon nie daardie antwoord gradeer nie. Probeer asseblief weer.

entries.source: I will keep the lesson active: hint, repair, slow down, or raise the challenge when you ask.
entries.value: Ek sal die les aktief hou: wenk, herstel, vertraag, of verhoog die uitdaging wanneer jy vra.

entries.source: If I am ready, ask me to state the idea in my own words. If not, ask the one question needed before final synthesis.
entries.value: As ek gereed is, vra my om die idee in my eie woorde te stel. Indien nie, vra die een vraag wat nodig is voor finale sintese.

entries.source: If price rises while volume stays steady, revenue can increase. If costs rise faster, free cash flow may still fall.
entries.value: As prys styg terwyl volume bestendig bly, kan inkomste toeneem. As koste vinniger styg, kan vrye kontantvloei steeds daal.

entries.source: If production costs rise, sellers need a higher price to supply the same quantity, so the supply curve shifts left.
entries.value: As produksiekoste styg, benodig verkopers 'n hoër prys om dieselfde hoeveelheid te verskaf, dus skuif die aanbodkurwe na links.

entries.source: If you understand a concept, you can give an example, a non-example, and solve a small unfamiliar case.
entries.value: As jy 'n konsep verstaan, kan jy 'n voorbeeld gee, 'n nie-voorbeeld, en 'n klein onbekende geval oplos.

entries.source: Ignoring slavery, freed status, and patronage would make your assumptions visibly modern.
entries.value: Om slawerny, vrye status en patronaat te ignoreer, sou jou aannames sigbaar modern maak.
